zh.lifeSummary: 當Euphemia Von Glogau於1254年1月12日出生在艾歐洛時，她的父親Konrad I of Glogów Duke of Glogów26歲，母親Salome of Greater Poland24歲。她和Albert I von Gorizia至少有2個兒子。她去世於1275年在義大利福利福利 維其亞 朱莉婭戈里齊亞戈里齊亞享年21歲。

nameMeanings.name: Von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Euphemia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a Late Greek name derived from eu ‘well, good’ + phēnai ‘to speak’. This was the name of various early saints, notably a virgin martyr said to have been burned at the stake at Chalcedon in 307 . It had a limited popularity in some regions in the 16th and 17th centuries and returned to favour in the Victorian period, especially in the pet form Effie . It is little used at present.

en.lifeSummary: When Euphemia Von Glogau was born on 12 January 1254, in Europe, her father, Konrad I of Glogów Duke of Glogów, was 26 and her mother, Salome of Greater Poland, was 24. She had at least 2 sons with Albert I von Gorizia. She died in 1275, in Gorizia, Gorizia, Friuli Venezia Giulia, Italy, at the age of 21.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Euphemia Von Glogau est née le 12 janvier 1254, à Europe, son père, Konrad I of Glogów Duke of Glogów, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Salome of Greater Poland, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Albert I von Gorizia. Elle est décédée en 1275, à Gorizia, Gorizia, Friuli Venezia Giulia, Italie, à l’âge de 21 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Euphemia Von Glogau am 12. Januar 1254 in Europa geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Konrad I of Glogów Duke of Glogów 26 und ihre Mutter Salome of Greater Poland 24. Sie hatte mit Albert I von Gorizia mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1275 im Alter von 21 Jahren in Gorizia, Gorizia, Friaul-Julisch Venetien, Italien.

Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Albert I von Gorizia. Morì nel 1275, nel Gorizia, Gorizia, Friuli Venezia Giulia, Italia, all'età di 21 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Euphemia Von Glogau(이)가 1254년 1월 12일 우럽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Konrad I of Glogów Duke of Glogów(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Salome of Greater Poland(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Albert I von Gorizia(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1275년 이탈리아 프리우리 븐지아 주리야 고리지아 고리지아에서 21세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Euphemia Von Glogau родилась 12 января 1254 г. в местности Европа, её отцу по имени Konrad I of Glogów Duke of Glogów было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Salome of Greater Poland, 24. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Albert I von Gorizia. Она умерла в 1275 г. в местности горизя, горизя, фрюли винезя гюля, Италия в возрасте 21 год.
